title: OpenAI starts offering a biology-tuned LLM
description: GPT-Rosalind is an LLM trained on biology workflows, available in closed access.

title: As they got close to the Moon, Artemis II astronauts were eager to land
description: "If you had given us the keys to the lander, we would have taken it down."

title: Mozilla launches Thunderbolt AI client with focus on self-hosted infrastructure
description: New tool builds on deepset’s Haystack toward a “decentralized open source AI ecosystem.”

title: Upscale AI in talks to raise at $2B valuation, says report
description: AI infrastructure company Upscale AI is reportedly in talks to raise its third funding round since launching just seven months ago.

title: Physical Intelligence, a hot robotics startup, says its new robot brain can figure out tasks it was never taught
description: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.

title: OpenAI takes aim at Anthropic with beefed-up Codex that gives it more power over your desktop
description: OpenAI's agentic coding tool has gotten a major makeover, with a variety of new powers and abilities.

title: Ad firms settle with Trump FTC over claims they boycotted conservative media
description: FTC aims to stamp out brand-safety standards that hurt Breitbart and Musk's X.

title: New Codex features include the ability to use your computer in the background
description: An in-app browser allows visual feedback while building websites and more.

title: Anthropic CPO leaves Figma’s board after reports he will offer a competing product
description: Krieger's departure and any forthcoming design tools will be another data point for investors who fear the SaaSpocalypse — that the largest AI labs will come to dominate software businesses, a thesis that has rocked public markets at times this year.

title: The Battle for OpenAI’s Soul
description: In Musk v. Altman, a jury will soon determine whether OpenAI has strayed from its founding mission to ensure AGI benefits humanity. Here’s what to know.

title: The UK Launches Its $675 Million Sovereign AI Fund
description: In a bid to minimize dependence on technology from other countries, the UK government is plowing resources into homegrown AI startups.

title: Google now lets you explore the web side-by-side with AI Mode
description: Now, when you're using AI Mode on Chrome desktop, clicking a link will open the web page side-by-side with AI Mode.

title: Google's AI Mode Update Tries to Kill Tab Hopping in Chrome
description: Google latest update to AI Mode in its Chrome browser is designed to keep the chatbot-style search tool always around once you start an online search journey.

title: Anthropic Plots Major London Expansion
description: As tensions with the US government mount, Anthropic has leased a new office with enough space to quadruple its 200-person head count in London.

title: Making AI operational in constrained public sector environments
description: The AI boom has hit across industries, and public sector organizations are facing pressure to accelerate adoption. title: Treating enterprise AI as an operating layer
description: There’s a fault line running through enterprise AI, and it’s not the one getting the most attention. title: The Download: cyberscammers’ banking bypasses, and carbon removal troubles

title: Why having “humans in the loop” in an AI war is an illusion
description: The availability of artificial intelligence for use in warfare is at the center of a legal battle between Anthropic and the Pentagon. title: This Beanie Is Designed to Read Your Thoughts
description: California-based startup Sabi is developing a thought-to-text wearable that could usher in the cyborg future.

title: The noise we make is hurting animals. Can we learn to shut up?
description: When the covid-19 pandemic started, Jennifer Phillips thought about the songs of the sparrows. They were easier to hear, because the world had suddenly become quieter. title: Understanding Convolutions on Graphs
description: Understanding the building blocks and design choices of graph neural networks.

title: A Gentle Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Adversarial Reprogramming of Neural Cellular Automata
description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
